name: Gucci
description: Dark chocolate from very tiny parents (mom and dad never got over 4 lb). Gorgeous hair, tiny flat face, brown button nose. Outgoing, friendly personality, she could go to a breeder home or a family home.

name: Tyra
description:
Dark chocolate, gorgeous thick fluffy hair, big green expressive eyes, turned up liver nose, and a straight topline. Short, cobby body. Sweet and loving little girl
She is barely old enough for her first show, but she won 1st in the Toy group!
Very outgoing and she had lots of fun. She's already leash trained and rides in the car like a champ.

name: Little petey
description:
This little guy was born April 11th and these photos were his first time away from mom and it was frightening so better pictures coming when he matures a little he has the perfect little face with snub nose but he won’t look at camera right now but you can see his color
Akc is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year

name: Nico
description:
This little guy is solid chocolate, without any white on him.
He was born April 11th. He already has thick beautiful hair. A nice flat face and large expressive eyes. He is already started pad training and doing very well with it. 
AKC is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year

name: Easter Lily
description: This little girl was born on Easter Sunday. She is a beautiful caramel color with liver nose and pigment. She is charting to be about 8 pounds grown. She has an excellent flat face and thick double coat. AKC papers can be added within the first year for an additional fee.

name: Tippy Coachella
description:
Tippy is adorable and one of my favorites- she already has an adorable personality 
She has the short cobby body and short little legs- she has the extreme flat face with bright green eyes and tiny brown button nose 
She is ckc registered at this price but akc is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year
